content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

No correctness issues found in the reviewed branch state. Reviewed the product-code changes in src/cli/pr.rs, src/cli/drain.rs, src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_open.rs, and src/test_support/drain_harness.rs against dce1e633cce9f559a357e55782d2ace7f94ff298, ignoring .ralph-burning runtime state. nix build passed; direct cargo test attempts were blocked by the local rustup configuration lacking a default toolchain.

## Amendments

None.
